questions.text: Which of the following describes a key bottleneck related to Exists vs In?
options: Inefficient scaling of EXISTS semi-join optimization vs IN subquery execution plans comparison under different datasets.
questions.correct_answer: Inefficient scaling of EXISTS semi-join optimization vs IN subquery execution plans comparison under different datasets.
questions.explanation: The topic covers how EXISTS semi-join optimization vs IN subquery execution plans comparison under different datasets scales under concurrent workloads, which represents the primary bottlenecks.
